creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Hardy,

there hasn't been an update on your problem report for graphics/mesa-demos
[1] for a while, and the port has been updated in the meantime. Can you
still reproduce the problem with the port's current version, or can this
PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134414
